issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and other workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were being enrolled in duplicate workflow branches, causing HAs and TCs to receive double tasks across post-referral and other workflows. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support to resolve the filter issue.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper unenrollment criteria for those deal stages. Madelaine made a tweak to the workflow filters to address this.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any outstanding tasks on deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage reverted and reset to Offer Accepted
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, reverted to Referred Active or Committed due to a fallen contract, and then set back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was missing as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. Madelaine added it as a re-enrollment trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on a deal
issues.desc: After a loan officer change on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO rather than the updated one. The correct LO was reflected in Dash but not in HubSpot-triggered emails. Luis resolved the issue on the product/integration side.
issues.workaround: Manually resend any automated emails referencing the wrong LO for deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window.

issues.title: MRC and other deals reaching Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs in workflow or generating tasks
issues.desc: Deals from MRC and other non-lender sources that were updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow or generating tasks. The issue affected deals with no lender assigned and was investigated with HubSpot support. Madelaine confirmed the issue was fixed after speaking with HubSpot support.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC or non-lender deals updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window into the TC workflow and send closing info emails manually.
